title: Hunger in Peaceful | UPDATED
description: The original Hunger on Peaceful ported to newer versions of Minecraft!
body:
**Hunger on Peaceful** was a great mod, but some wanted it for a newer version.

Today, I present you Hunger in Peaceful. It's the **original** Hunger on Peaceful mod, but ported and maintained for newer versions.

Hunger in Peaceful makes the hunger and health system work like the Easy difficulty, so you can lose hunger and then eat, just like higher difficulty levels.

**Original:** https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hunger-on-peaceful

------

Thanks to [harborsss](https://modrinth.com/mod/harbors-hungry-peaceful) for making an amazing mod for the same purpose for 1.21.4 before I did.
